---
title: "EUVox2014: An EU-wide voting advice application (VAA) for the 2014 elections to the European Parliament"
date: "2014"
year: "2014"
funder: "Open Society Initiative for Europe & DG for Communication of the European Parliament (area of internet-based activities/online media)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
---

EUVox2014: An EU-wide voting advice application (VAA) for the 2014 elections to the European Parliament
